executive_summary.overall_state: Early-stage campaign: €349.61 spent, 230 clicks, 3 conversions at €116.54 CPA. Campaign is generating traffic but conversion efficiency is unproven.
executive_summary.main_strength: 3 converting keywords identified (buitengevelisolatie, gevel van buiten isoleren, buitenmuur isoleren), demonstrating viable conversion path.
executive_summary.main_weakness: €193.42 spent on keywords with zero conversions (55.3% of budget). Concentration in non-converting themes (stuc_crepi, bekleden, steenstrips).
executive_summary.caution: Only 3 conversions in 30 days. All keyword-level conclusions are provisional. Do not make aggressive changes until conversion volume grows or tracking is verified.

strengths: 3 converting keywords identified (buitengevelisolatie, gevel van buiten isoleren, buitenmuur isoleren), demonstrating viable conversion path.
weaknesses: €193.42 spent on keywords with zero conversions (55.3% of budget). Concentration in non-converting themes (stuc_crepi, bekleden, steenstrips).
landing_page_issues: 10 paid sessions on (not set) landing pages -- tracking gap

recommendations_do_now.rationale: Only 3.0 conversions in 30 days. Before making keyword decisions, confirm all lead forms, phone taps, and WhatsApp clicks fire Contact_Form_Site / Phone / Whatsapp events in GA4.
recommendations_do_now.risk: If tracking is broken, all keyword performance data is misleading.

recommendations_do_now.rationale: These keywords drive the only conversions: buitengevelisolatie, gevel van buiten isoleren, buitenmuur isoleren. Ensure adequate budget, competitive bids, and they are not limited by ad rank.
recommendations_do_now.risk: Low risk -- these are proven performers.

recommendations_do_now.action: Review top pause candidates (€193.42 at-risk spend)
recommendations_do_now.rationale: Top candidates: gevel isoleren en bekleden (PHRASE), buitenmuur isoleren en stucen (PHRASE), buitengevelisolatie met steenstrips (EXACT). High spend, zero conversions. Consider pausing or adding search-term negatives to restrict matching.
recommendations_do_now.risk: Low conversion volume means some of these keywords may convert with more time. Pause cautiously.

recommendations_monitor.rationale: 6 keywords at moderate spend with no conversions. Re-evaluate after 2 more weeks of data.
recommendations_monitor.risk: Premature pausing could lose viable keywords.

recommendations_monitor.action: Monitor 8 search terms as potential negatives
recommendations_monitor.rationale: Top: 'gevelisolatie buitenkant' (€21.07, 10 clicks, 0 conv). Track for 2 more weeks before adding as negatives.
recommendations_monitor.risk: Some may convert with more volume. Low urgency.

recommendations_monitor.action: Investigate (not set) landing page tracking gap
recommendations_monitor.rationale: 10 paid sessions on (not set) landing pages -- tracking gap
recommendations_monitor.risk: May distort landing page performance data.

recommendations_monitor.rationale: These keywords appear in both paid and organic. As organic rankings improve, consider reducing PPC bids for terms where organic CTR is strong.
recommendations_monitor.risk: Need more organic CTR data before acting.

recommendations_monitor.action: Investigate 1 paid landing pages with weak engagement
recommendations_monitor.rationale: Pages: (not set). Engagement rate < 40% with meaningful paid traffic. Could indicate landing page relevance issues.
recommendations_monitor.risk: Could be normal for informational queries. Check intent alignment first.

recommendations_do_later.rationale: These enabled keywords received 0 impressions in 30 days. Likely overlap with other keywords or have quality score issues.
recommendations_do_later.risk: Very low urgency -- not costing anything. Clean up for account hygiene.

recommendations_do_later.rationale: Top candidates: gevelisolatie buitenkant (590/mo), buiten gevelisolatie (480/mo), gevel isoleren (390/mo). High search volume, relevant themes, not yet in ads. Add after current campaign stabilizes.
recommendations_do_later.risk: No urgency. Current campaign efficiency should be improved first.

recommendations_do_later.action: Review 10 keywords with weak/missing page mapping
recommendations_do_later.rationale: These active PPC keywords don't have a clearly mapped landing page. May indicate ad-to-landing-page relevance issues.
recommendations_do_later.risk: Needs manual review of actual ad destinations vs. keyword intent.

limitations: Very low conversion volume (3 conversions in 30 days)
GA4 data covers 90 days vs 30-day PPC window
No Google Ads API -- using exported CSVs
Conversion attribution may differ between Ads and GA4
Search term data may be incomplete (privacy thresholds)
